title: Nostalgia-Core Steves
dek: The Steves whose rerun, cable, and childhood afterlife makes them feel permanently retrievable.
thesis: Some Steves never really leave circulation. They linger in after-school memory, cable repetition, streaming rediscovery, and quote-level recognition. This collection is less about prestige than recurrence: the Steves that keep getting found again.
seoTitle: Nostalgia-Core Steves | As Steve on TV
seoDescription: An editorial collection of Steves whose afterlife in memory and reruns keeps the archive humming.
